should_trigger.text: Ignore the feature-request chatter and run a pre-merge frontend review on this React diff for keyboard navigation, unsafe rendering, and missing empty states.
Treat this as a quality gate: review the component for a11y, form handling, and behavior regressions instead of rewriting it.

should_not_trigger.text: Build a React form with accessible labels, safe rendering, and polished empty states.
Explain keyboard navigation problems in this component and teach me the basics.

near_neighbor.text: Brainstorm a reusable frontend review checklist for later, but do not inspect the code or run a review.
Debug this component's form handling bug and fix the unsafe rendering issue.
